pi_items.source: Task description step 2: 'Set the Log Type to **Activity**'. Activity is a core farmOS log type per https://farmos.org/guide/logs/
Task description step 3: 'Set the Name/Title to: `Biosecurity Log - Sunrise Feeds`'
Task description step 4: 'Set the Date to **Today**'
setup_task.sh references PACKAGE='org.farmos.app' (farmOS Field Kit mobile app)
verifier.py line 57: metadata.get('driver_name', 'M. Chen') - this is the default value used if metadata field is missing
verifier.py line 58: metadata.get('vehicle_id', 'TRK-882') - this is the default value used if metadata field is missing
task.json file size is 406 bytes and ends abruptly at line 'In the Notes field, enter exactly:\n' without closing the description string or including a metadata object

pi_items.metadata_value: Must contain driver name, vehicle ID, and 'Undercarriage spray'
pi_items.verified_value: verifier.py line 65 expects notes to contain driver_name, vehicle_id, and 'Undercarriage spray'

privileged_info_summary: The task record_biosecurity_visitor_entry@1 requires creating an Activity log (a real farmOS log type) in the farmOS Field Kit mobile app (org.farmos.app). The log should document a biosecurity visitor entry event with title 'Biosecurity Log - Sunrise Feeds', today's date, and notes containing visitor name (M. Chen), vehicle ID (TRK-882), and undercarriage spray documentation. The task.json file is incomplete (truncated at 406 bytes). The task uses synthetic test data executed on a clean Android emulator with offline-first Field Kit app. 'Undercarriage spray' refers to biosecurity sanitization procedures common in agricultural operations to prevent disease transmission.
